description: Format responses in plain Markdown using simple headings, bullets, and fenced code blocks.

blocks.content:
Formatting re-enabled.
Format responses in plain Markdown. Use headings when helpful, use `-` for bullets, use backticks for inline code and identifiers, and use fenced code blocks with a language tag when known.
- Keep formatting clean and minimal; avoid decorative symbols, emojis, em dashes, excessive emphasis, and raw HTML unless explicitly asked for.
- Never use nested triple backticks for anything.
